name: PopUp
shortDescription: Display pop-ups to alert, ask confirmation, and let user type a response in text box.

eventsFunctions.name: PromptValidResponse
eventsFunctions.description: The response to a pop-up message is filled.

eventsFunctions.name: PromptResponse
eventsFunctions.description: Return the text response by user to prompt.

eventsFunctions.name: Prompt
eventsFunctions.description: Displays a prompt in a pop-up that prompts the user for input. This action return the text input or the false boolean if canceled.

eventsFunctions.name: Confirm
eventsFunctions.description: Ask confirmation of user with a message in a dialog box with an OK button, and a Cancel button.

eventsFunctions.name: ConfimationResponse
eventsFunctions.description: Check if a confirmation was accepted.

eventsFunctions.name: Alert
eventsFunctions.description: Displays an alert box with a message and an OK button in a pop-up window.

description:
This extension adds actions to display three kinds of pop-ups.

## Alert
 - Pops-up a message that will pause the game until dismissed by the player.

## Confirmation
 - Pops-up a dialogue containing a message with the option to either confirm or cancel.

## Prompt
**Note that this pop-up type is unsupported on previews and PC exports.**
 - Displays a message to the player with a text field to write an answer in. The player will also have the option to either confirm or discard their input.
